utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ohh ! It is so nice to meet you . Hello .

utterances.speaker: Mrs. Burgin
utterances.text: Hello . Well , Joshua , that $ 500 was for groceries .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: This ... this , no , oh no , no ... no ... no , this is not ... that is ... that is not what it is .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: See , see , okay , I work in fashion , see and ... and , this is a real dress actually .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: It is ... it is , they are ... they are wearing it in Milan , so part of my job is too wear the clothes , and then I see how people respond , and then I report back to my superiors at Bloomingdale’s .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Burgin
utterances.text: So , have you kids eaten yet ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , we were going to do that after ... I mean umm , next .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Burgin
utterances.text: Well , we are starving , why do not we all go get something to eat ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , yeah , well ... Yeah , no use wasting this baby , just lyin around the house .

utterances.speaker: Mr. Burgin
utterances.text: You will wear that . We will be eating , and of course , you will be wearing that .
